headings.text: KEF Introduces Two New THX Certified Architectural Speakers
KEF Introduces Two New THX Certified Architectural Speakers
THX Certified Ultra Speakers with MAT

If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingKEF Introduces Two New THX Certified Architectural SpeakersPosted on June 18, 2025KEF Introduces Two New THX Certified Architectural SpeakersThe high-impact, in-wall speakers feature KEF‚Äôs Metamaterial Absorption Technology.Experience high-impact, immersive sound with the latest additions to KEF‚Äôs Extreme Home Theater range ‚Äî the Ci5160RLM-THX and Ci3160RLM-THX.KEF‚Äôs Ci-R Series is a direct beneficiary of the technological innovations developed for The Reference, the class-leading series that continually set the benchmark for loudspeakers and sound reproduction since its launch in 1973. With a paintable metallic grille, they seamlessly blend into any home decor and allow listeners to truly immerse themselves in sound, hearing all the details exactly as the artist intended, whether set up in large home theatres or living rooms alike.‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçIncorporating a 12th generation Uni-Q driver array featuring KEF‚Äôs Metamaterial Absorption Technology (MAT), the Ci-R Series speakers are guaranteed to deliver the best experience to every listening position in the room.‚ÄçTHX Certified Ultra Speakers with MATThe Ci5160RLM-THX and Ci3160RLM-THX carry the prestigious THX Certified Ultra designation, having undergone rigorous tests in output levels, frequency response, signal-to-noise ratio, and distortion, ensuring it recreates high-impact cinema sound and best-in-class audio fidelity.They also benefit from MAT, which is a highly complex maze-like structure that absorbs 99 percent of the unwanted sound from the rear of the tweeter, delivering a crisper, more natural treble performance.‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçThese two new additions are designed to be discreet in appearance and engineered with best-in-class acoustic performance, delivering an immersive soundscape, while the speakers blend into the interior design. Ci5160RLM-THX and Ci3160RLM-THX are available in Aluminum Silver, an anodized silver aluminum front baffle, including tone matched Uni-Q and bass drivers. The speakers come with a paintable magnetic metal grille, which can be color-matched to the chosen interior style. A black cloth grille can be purchased as an additional accessory as well.‚ÄçThe Ci5160RLM-THX and Ci3160RLM-THX retail for $2999.99 and $1999.99, respectively.‚ÄçFor more information, please visit us.kef.com.‚ÄçOriginal article can be found at: https://www.residentialsystems.com/technology/audio/kef-introduces-two-new-thx-certified-architectural-speakers‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçIf you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçServices:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‚ÄçProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçEngage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright ¬© 2023.
